```{r}
  # Load score files
  pgs_baseline <- fread(baseline_file, select = c("IID", param_col))
  pgs_masked <- fread(masked_file, select = c("IID", param_col))
  
  setnames(pgs_baseline, param_col, "pgs_s")
  setnames(pgs_masked, param_col, "pgs_s_prime")
  
  # Merge to align individuals
  percentile_df <- merge(pgs_baseline, pgs_masked, by = "IID")
  
  if (nrow(percentile_df) == 0) {
    print(paste("Skipping prop", prop, "- no individuals in common"))
    next
  }
  
  # --- ALL NEW LOGIC ---
  
  # 1. Create the "True Percentile Rank" from the baseline score (s)
  percentile_df[, rank_true := percent_rank(pgs_s)]
  
  # 2. Create an Empirical CDF function from the *baseline* (s) distribution.
  ecdf_baseline <- ecdf(percentile_df$pgs_s)
  
  # 3. Create the corrected scores by re-scaling the variance
  percentile_df[, pgs_s_corrected_obs := pgs_s_prime * (1/sqrt(obs_v_rel))]
  percentile_df[, pgs_s_corrected_est := pgs_s_prime * (1/sqrt(obs_v_rel))]
  
  # 4. Apply the baseline CDF to all three scores
  percentile_df[, rank_naive_std := ecdf_baseline(pgs_s_prime)]
  percentile_df[, rank_corrected_obs_std := ecdf_baseline(pgs_s_corrected_obs)]
  percentile_df[, rank_corrected_est_std := ecdf_baseline(pgs_s_corrected_est)]
  
  # --- End NEW LOGIC ---
  
  
  # --- Bin the data for a smooth plot ---
  percentile_df[, true_percentile_bin := cut(rank_true,
                                           breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.02),
                                           labels = FALSE,
                                           include.lowest = TRUE)]
  
  # Summarize by bin
  binned_percentiles <- percentile_df[, .(
    mean_true_rank = mean(rank_true, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_naive_rank = mean(rank_naive_std, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_corrected_obs_rank = mean(rank_corrected_obs_std, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_corrected_est_rank = mean(rank_corrected_est_std, na.rm = TRUE)
  ), by = true_percentile_bin]
  
  # Add metadata for plotting
  binned_percentiles$prop <- prop
  binned_percentiles$call_rate <- paste0('Call rate = ', 1 - prop)
  
  plot_data_list[[length(plot_data_list) + 1]] <- binned_percentiles
} # End of prop loop


# --- 4. Combine and Create Plot ---
if (length(plot_data_list) == 0) {
  stop("No data was successfully processed. Cannot create plot.")
}

# Melt the data to long format for ggplot
plot_data_wide <- rbindlist(plot_data_list)
plot_data_long <- melt(plot_data_wide, 
                       id.vars = c("true_percentile_bin", "mean_true_rank", "prop", "call_rate"),
                       measure.vars = c("mean_naive_rank", "mean_corrected_obs_rank", "mean_corrected_est_rank"),
                       variable.name = "model_type",
                       value.name = "mean_observed_rank")

# Clean up the labels to match your slope plot
plot_data_long[model_type == "mean_naive_rank", model_type := "Naive"]
plot_data_long[model_type == "mean_corrected_obs_rank", model_type := "Corrected (observed)"]
plot_data_long[model_type == "mean_corrected_est_rank", model_type := "Corrected (estimated)"]

plot_data_long$model_type <- factor(plot_data_long$model_type, 
                                  levels = c("Naive", "Corrected (observed)", "Corrected (estimated)"))

# Factor call_rate to ensure correct panel order
plot_data_long$call_rate <- factor(plot_data_long$call_rate, 
                             levels = c("Call rate = 0.5", "Call rate = 0.75", "Call rate = 0.95"))

# Create the plot
plot_percentile_compression <- ggplot(plot_data_long[plot_data_long$model_type == 'Naive',], 
                                      aes(x = mean_true_rank, y = mean_observed_rank, color = model_type)) +
  
  # The y=x "Truth" line
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  
  # Plot all three lines
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~call_rate) +
  
  # Use the same colors as your slope plot
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Naive" = "red", 
                                "Corrected (observed)" = "green", 
                                "Corrected (estimated)" = "blue")) +
  
  labs(
    title = paste("Standardized Percentile Compression & Correction for", example_trait),
    subtitle = paste("Showing", example_pop, "population,", example_method, "method"),
    x = "True Percentile\n(from baseline PGS 's' distribution)",
    y = "Observed Percentile\n(Score mapped to baseline distribution)",
    color = "Model Type"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  theme_half_open() +
  background_grid(major = 'xy') +
  panel_border() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

png('~/percentile_sparse_wgs.png', res = 300, width = 3000, height = 1750, units = 'px')
plot_percentile_compression
dev.off()
system('dx upload ~/recalibrate_sparse_wgs.png --path mind_the_gap/results/')

# Create the plot
plot_percentile_compression <- ggplot(plot_data_long, 
                                      aes(x = mean_true_rank, y = mean_observed_rank, color = model_type,
                                          linetype = model_type)) +
  
  # The y=x "Truth" line
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  
  # Plot all three lines
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~call_rate) +
  
  # Use the same colors as your slope plot
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Naive" = "red", 
                                "Corrected (observed)" = "green", 
                                "Corrected (estimated)" = "blue")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Naive" = "solid", 
                                   "Corrected (observed)" = "solid", 
                                   "Corrected (estimated)" = "dashed"), guide = "none") +
  labs(
    title = paste("Standardized Percentile Compression & Correction for", example_trait),
    subtitle = paste("Showing", example_pop, "population,", example_method, "method"),
    x = "True Percentile\n(from baseline PGS 's' distribution)",
    y = "Observed Percentile\n(Score mapped to baseline distribution)",
    color = "Model Type"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  theme_half_open() +
  background_grid(major = 'xy') +
  panel_border() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

png('~/percentile_sparse_wgs_with_estimated.png', res = 300, width = 3000, height = 1750, units = 'px')
plot_percentile_compression
dev.off()
system('dx upload ~/recalibrate_sparse_wgs_with_estimated.png --path mind_the_gap/results/')

```

***

### Compare LD-aware and LD-naive estimates of relative variance

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)

# --- 1. Data Processing Loop ---
# Define analysis parameters
props <- c(0.05, 0.25, 0.5)

# Read in the LD naive estimated relative variance
est_dat <- NULL
for(i in props){
  tmp <- fread(paste0('/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/score_files/est_rsq.wgs.sparse.random.',i,'.ld_naive.txt'))
  tmp$prop <- i
  est_dat <- rbind(est_dat, tmp)
}
est_dat<-est_dat[, c('population', 'beta_set','relative_R2','prop'), with = F]
names(est_dat)<-c('population', 'param','est_rel_var_naive', 'prop')
est_dat$param<-paste0(est_dat$param, '_SUM')

# Read in previous results
results_dt <- fread('/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/results/wgs_random_sparse_results.csv')
results_dt <- results_dt[, c('param','trait','prop','obs_rel_var','est_rel_var','pgs_method','population','call_rate'), with = F]

results_dt<-results_dt[results_dt$pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' | (results_dt$pgs_method == 'pT+clump' & grepl('0_1_SUM', results_dt$param)),]

both <- merge(results_dt, est_dat, by = c('param','population','prop'))
dt_melted <- melt(
  both,
  id.vars = c("trait", "population","pgs_method", "obs_rel_var","call_rate"),   # or whatever IDs you need
  measure.vars = c("est_rel_var", "est_rel_var_naive"),
  variable.name = "variance_type",
  value.name   = "relative_variance"
)
dt_melted$variance_type <- factor(
  dt_melted$variance_type,
  levels = c('est_rel_var', 'est_rel_var_naive'),
  labels = c('LD-aware', 'LD-naive')
)

# Compare estimated and observed relative variance
metrics <- dt_melted %>%
  group_by(pgs_method, variance_type) %>%
  summarise(
    pearson_r = coef(lm(scale(obs_rel_var)  ~ scale(relative_variance)))[2],
    pearson_r_ci_low = confint(lm(scale(obs_rel_var)  ~ scale(relative_variance)))[2,1],
    pearson_r_ci_high = confint(lm(scale(obs_rel_var)  ~ scale(relative_variance)))[2,2],
    slope = coef(lm(obs_rel_var  ~ relative_variance))[2],
    slope_ci_low = confint(lm(obs_rel_var  ~ relative_variance))[2,1],
    slope_ci_high = confint(lm(obs_rel_var  ~ relative_variance))[2,2],
    .groups = "drop"
  )

metrics$text <- paste0("r = ", round(metrics$pearson_r, 2),
                       " [", round(metrics$pearson_r_ci_low, 2), ", ", round(metrics$pearson_r_ci_high, 2), "]",
                       "\nβ = ", round(metrics$slope, 2),
                       " [", round(metrics$slope_ci_low, 2), ", ", round(metrics$slope_ci_high, 2), "]")

png('obs_est_rel_var_ld_naive_aware_comparison.png',
    units = 'px',
    width = 2750,
    height = 2500,
    res = 300)

ggplot(dt_melted, aes(x = relative_variance, y = obs_rel_var, fill = call_rate)) +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point(shape = 21) +
  facet_grid(pgs_method ~ variance_type) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0,1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Estimated relative variance", y = 'Observed relative variance', fill = NULL) +
  geom_text(data = metrics, aes(x = 0.3, y = 0.95, label = text), inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 4)

dev.off()
system('dx upload ~/obs_est_rel_var_ld_naive_aware_comparison.png --path mind_the_gap/results/')

```

***

## WGS Sparse: Baseline vs Masked (proportions)

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(stringr)
library(foreach)
library(doMC)
registerDoMC(8)

# --- 1. Data Processing Loop ---
# This section is an enhanced version of your original code.

# Define analysis parameters
populations <- c('EUR')
traits <- c('HT', 'HB', 'PLT', 'BMI', 'BWT', 'MCHC', 'SBP', 'NEU', 'HDL', 'TC')
base_dir_baseline <- '~/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/baseline/'
base_dir_masked <- '~/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/masked/'
pheno_dir <- '/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/phenotype/'
props <- c(0.05, 0.25, 0.5)

n_boot <- 1000 # Number of bootstrap replicates
set.seed(123)  # For reproducible results

# Create the list to hold all results
final_results_list <- list()

# --- 2. RUN SEQUENTIAL OUTER LOOP (for pop) ---
for (pop in populations) {
    print(paste("Processing Population:", pop))
  for (prop in props) {
    print(paste("Processing prop:", prop))
    
    baseline_file <- paste0(base_dir_baseline, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.sscore')
    masked_file <- paste0(base_dir_masked, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.prop_', prop, '.sscore')
    
    if (!file.exists(baseline_file) || !file.exists(masked_file)) {
        print(paste("Skipping pop:", pop, "- files not found"))
        next 
    }
    
    pgs_baseline <- fread(baseline_file)
    pgs_masked <- fread(masked_file)

    pgs_baseline <- pgs_baseline[pgs_baseline$IID %in% pgs_masked$IID, ]
    pgs_masked <- pgs_masked[pgs_masked$IID %in% pgs_baseline$IID, ]

    # --- 3. RUN PARALLEL INNER LOOP (for trait) ---
    trait_results_list <- foreach(
        trait = traits,
        .combine = 'append', 
        .packages = 'data.table',
        .export = c('pheno_dir', 'n_boot', 'pgs_baseline', 'pgs_masked', 'pop') 
    ) %dopar% {
        
        pheno_file <- paste0(pheno_dir, trait, '.', pop, '.txt')
        if (!file.exists(pheno_file)) {
            return(list()) 
        }
        
        pheno <- fread(pheno_file)

        # Subset PGS data
        pgs_baseline_i <- pgs_baseline[, c('IID', names(pgs_baseline)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_baseline)) &
                                                                        grepl(trait, names(pgs_baseline))]), with = F]
        pgs_masked_i <- pgs_masked[, c('IID', names(pgs_masked)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_masked)) &
                                                                    grepl(trait, names(pgs_masked))]), with = F]
        
        # Merge PGS data
        pgs_baseline_pheno <- merge(pheno, pgs_baseline_i, by = 'IID', sort = FALSE)
        pgs_masked_pheno <- merge(pheno, pgs_masked_i, by = 'IID', sort = FALSE)
        
        # --- NEW: CRITICAL ALIGNMENT STEP ---
        # Ensure both data.tables have the same individuals in the same order
        common_iids <- intersect(pgs_baseline_pheno$IID, pgs_masked_pheno$IID)
        pgs_baseline_pheno <- pgs_baseline_pheno[IID %in% common_iids][order(IID)]
        pgs_masked_pheno <- pgs_masked_pheno[IID %in% common_iids][order(IID)]
        # Now, row 'i' in one table matches row 'i' in the other
        
        param_cols <- names(pgs_baseline_i)[-1]
        
        param_results_list <- list() 

        for (param in param_cols) {
            if (!(param %in% names(pgs_masked_pheno))) next
            
            n <- nrow(pgs_baseline_pheno)
            if (n == 0) next 
            
            # --- 1.5. BOOTSTRAPPING SECTION ---
            boot_stats <- replicate(n_boot, {
                indices <- sample(1:n, n, replace = TRUE)
                
                # Thanks to alignment, we can use indices on both
                boot_base <- pgs_baseline_pheno[indices]
                boot_masked <- pgs_masked_pheno[indices]
                
                # And we can use a single pheno vector
                pheno_vals_boot <- boot_base[['outcome']]
                pgs_vals_base <- boot_base[[param]]
                pgs_vals_masked <- boot_masked[[param]]
                
                # R2 stats
                r2_baseline_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pheno_vals_boot, pgs_vals_base)^2, error = function(e) NA)
                r2_masked_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pheno_vals_boot, pgs_vals_masked)^2, error = function(e) NA)
                
                # Relative Variance
                var_baseline_boot <- tryCatch(var(pgs_vals_base), error = function(e) NA)
                var_masked_boot <- tryCatch(var(pgs_vals_masked), error = function(e) NA)
                rel_var_boot <- if (is.na(var_baseline_boot) || is.na(var_masked_boot) || var_baseline_boot == 0) {
                    NA
                } else {
                    var_masked_boot / var_baseline_boot
                }
                
                # Correlation stat
                cor_baseline_masked_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pgs_vals_base, pgs_vals_masked), error = function(e) NA)
                cor_baseline_masked_sq_boot <- cor_baseline_masked_boot^2
                
                # Relative R2
                rel_r2_boot <- if (is.na(r2_baseline_boot) || is.na(r2_masked_boot) || r2_baseline_boot == 0) {
                    NA
                } else {
                    r2_masked_boot / r2_baseline_boot
                }
                
                # --- NEW: SLOPE CALCULATIONS ---
                beta_true_boot <- tryCatch(unname(coef(lm(pheno_vals_boot ~ pgs_vals_base))[2]), error = function(e) NA)
                beta_naive_boot <- tryCatch(unname(coef(lm(pheno_vals_boot ~ pgs_vals_masked))[2]), error = function(e) NA)

                attenuation_factor_boot <- if (is.na(cor_baseline_masked_sq_boot) || is.na(rel_var_boot) || rel_var_boot == 0) {
                    NA
                } else {
                    sqrt(cor_baseline_masked_sq_boot / rel_var_boot)
                }

                beta_corrected_boot <- if (is.na(beta_naive_boot) || is.na(attenuation_factor_boot) || attenuation_factor_boot == 0) {
                    NA
                } else {
                    beta_naive_boot / attenuation_factor_boot
                }

                beta_naive_ratio_boot <- if (is.na(beta_naive_boot) || is.na(beta_true_boot) || beta_true_boot == 0) {
                    NA
                } else {
                    beta_naive_boot / beta_true_boot
                }
                
                beta_corrected_ratio_boot <- if (is.na(beta_corrected_boot) || is.na(beta_true_boot) || beta_true_boot == 0) {
                    NA
                } else {
                    beta_corrected_boot / beta_true_boot
                }
                
                # Return a named vector
                c(
                    r2_baseline = r2_baseline_boot,
                    r2_masked = r2_masked_boot,
                    rel_var = rel_var_boot,
                    cor_baseline_masked = cor_baseline_masked_boot,
                    cor_baseline_masked_sq = cor_baseline_masked_sq_boot,
                    rel_r2 = rel_r2_boot,
                    beta_true = beta_true_boot,
                    beta_naive = beta_naive_boot,
                    beta_corrected = beta_corrected_boot,
                    beta_naive_ratio = beta_naive_ratio_boot,
                    beta_corrected_ratio = beta_corrected_ratio_boot
                )
            })
            
            # Transpose boot_stats
            boot_stats_t <- t(boot_stats)
            
            # --- Calculate 95% CIs ---
            safe_quantile <- function(col_name) {
                # Add an extra safety check for all-NA columns
                if (!col_name %in% colnames(boot_stats_t) || all(is.na(boot_stats_t[, col_name]))) {
                    return(c(NA, NA))
                }
                quantile(boot_stats_t[, col_name], c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
            }
            
            r2_baseline_ci <- safe_quantile("r2_baseline")
            r2_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("r2_masked")
            rel_var_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_var")
            cor_baseline_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_masked")
            cor_baseline_masked_sq_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_masked_sq")
            rel_r2_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_r2")
            
            # NEW Slope CIs
            beta_true_ci <- safe_quantile("beta_true")
            beta_naive_ci <- safe_quantile("beta_naive")
            beta_corrected_ci <- safe_quantile("beta_corrected")
            beta_naive_ratio_ci <- safe_quantile("beta_naive_ratio")
            beta_corrected_ratio_ci <- safe_quantile("beta_corrected_ratio")
            # --- END BOOTSTRAPPING ---
            
            # --- 1.6. Calculate Point Estimates ---
            pheno_point <- pgs_baseline_pheno[['outcome']]
            pgs_s_point <- pgs_baseline_pheno[[param]]
            pgs_s_prime_point <- pgs_masked_pheno[[param]]
            
            r2_baseline_pheno <- cor(pheno_point, pgs_s_point)^2
            r2_masked_pheno <- cor(pheno_point, pgs_s_prime_point)^2
            p_val <- coef(summary(lm(pheno_point ~ pgs_s_point)))[2,4]
            cor_baseline_masked <- cor(pgs_s_point, pgs_s_prime_point)
            cor_baseline_masked_sq <- cor_baseline_masked^2
            
            var_baseline <- var(pgs_s_point)
            var_masked <- var(pgs_s_prime_point)
            rel_var_point <- var_masked / var_baseline

            # NEW Slope Point Estimates
            beta_true_point <- unname(coef(lm(pheno_point ~ pgs_s_point))[2])
            beta_naive_point <- unname(coef(lm(pheno_point ~ pgs_s_prime_point))[2])
            
            attenuation_factor_point <- if (rel_var_point == 0) NA else sqrt(cor_baseline_masked_sq / rel_var_point)
            beta_corrected_point <- if (is.na(attenuation_factor_point) || attenuation_factor_point == 0) NA else (beta_naive_point / attenuation_factor_point)
            
            beta_naive_ratio_point <- if (beta_true_point == 0) NA else (beta_naive_point / beta_true_point)
            beta_corrected_ratio_point <- if (beta_true_point == 0) NA else (beta_corrected_point / beta_true_point)

            # --- 1.7. Store results ---
            param_results_list[[length(param_results_list) + 1]] <- data.table(
                param = param,
                trait = trait,
                population = pop,
                prop = prop,
                r2_baseline_pheno = r2_baseline_pheno,
                r2_masked_pheno = r2_masked_pheno,
                cor_baseline_masked = cor_baseline_masked,
                cor_baseline_masked_sq = cor_baseline_masked_sq,
                obs_rel_r2 = r2_masked_pheno / r2_baseline_pheno,
                obs_rel_var = rel_var_point,
                p_baseline_pheno = p_val,
                n = nrow(pgs_baseline_pheno),
                r2_baseline_low_ci = r2_baseline_ci[1],
                r2_baseline_high_ci = r2_baseline_ci[2],
                r2_masked_low_ci = r2_masked_ci[1],
                r2_masked_high_ci = r2_masked_ci[2],
                rel_var_low_ci = rel_var_ci[1],
                rel_var_high_ci = rel_var_ci[2],
                cor_baseline_masked_low_ci = cor_baseline_masked_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_masked_high_ci = cor_baseline_masked_ci[2],
                cor_baseline_masked_sq_low_ci = cor_baseline_masked_sq_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_masked_sq_high_ci = cor_baseline_masked_sq_ci[2],
                rel_r2_low_ci = rel_r2_ci[1],
                rel_r2_high_ci = rel_r2_ci[2],
                
                # NEW Slope Results
                beta_true = beta_true_point,
                beta_true_low_ci = beta_true_ci[1], beta_true_high_ci = beta_true_ci[2],
                beta_naive = beta_naive_point,
                beta_naive_low_ci = beta_naive_ci[1], beta_naive_high_ci = beta_naive_ci[2],
                beta_corrected = beta_corrected_point,
                beta_corrected_low_ci = beta_corrected_ci[1], beta_corrected_high_ci = beta_corrected_ci[2],
                beta_naive_ratio = beta_naive_ratio_point,
                beta_naive_ratio_low_ci = beta_naive_ratio_ci[1], beta_naive_ratio_high_ci = beta_naive_ratio_ci[2],
                beta_corrected_ratio = beta_corrected_ratio_point,
                beta_corrected_ratio_low_ci = beta_corrected_ratio_ci[1], beta_corrected_ratio_high_ci = beta_corrected_ratio_ci[2]
            )
        } # End of param loop
        
        # The parallel worker returns the list of data.tables for this trait
        return(param_results_list) 
        
    } # End of parallel trait loop

    # --- 4. COMBINE RESULTS (within sequential loop) ---
    if (length(trait_results_list) > 0) {
        final_results_list <- append(final_results_list, trait_results_list)
    }
  } # End of prop loop

} # End of sequential pop loop

results_dt <- rbindlist(final_results_list)
results_dt[, pgs_method := ifelse(str_detect(param, 'sbayesrc'), 'SBayesRC', 'pT+clump')]
results_dt$call_rate<-paste0('Call rate = ', 1-results_dt$prop)

write.csv(results_dt, '~/wgs_sparse_results.csv', row.names=F)
system('dx upload ~/wgs_sparse_results.csv --path mind_the_gap/results/')
results_dt <- fread('/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/results/wgs_sparse_results.csv')

# Plot the relative R2 between baseline and masked PGS
ggplot(results_dt[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & results_dt$population == 'EUR', ], 
       aes(x = trait, y = obs_rel_r2, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_r2_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_r2_high_ci)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
#  coord_fixed() +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Trait", 
       y = "Observed relative R2 (95%CI)",
       colour = NULL)

# Plot the relative variance between baseline and masked PGS
ggplot(results_dt[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC', ], 
       aes(x = trait, y = obs_rel_var, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_var_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_var_high_ci)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
#  coord_fixed() +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Trait", 
       y = "Observed relative variance (95%CI)",
       colour = NULL)
# Masked PGS have substantially lower variance as expected

# Compare observed relative R2 and relative variance
p1 <- ggplot(results_dt[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & results_dt$population == 'EUR', ], 
       aes(x = obs_rel_var, y = obs_rel_r2, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = rel_var_low_ci, 
                    xmax = rel_var_high_ci), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_r2_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_r2_high_ci), width = 0) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = expression(Observed~Var[s*minute] / Var[s]),
        y = expression(Observed~R[s*minute]^2 / R[s]^2),
        colour = NULL)

# Compare squared correlation between PGS and observed relative R2
p2 <- ggplot(results_dt[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & results_dt$population == 'EUR', ], 
       aes(x = cor_baseline_masked_sq, y = obs_rel_r2, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = cor_baseline_masked_sq_low_ci, 
                    xmax = cor_baseline_masked_sq_high_ci), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_r2_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_r2_high_ci), width = 0) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = expression(Observed~Cor(s, s*minute)^2),
        y = expression(Observed~R[s*minute]^2 / R[s]^2),
        colour = NULL)

png('~/obs_rel_var_r2_comp.png', res = 300, width = 2750, height = 2500, units = 'px')
plot_grid(p1, p2, labels = c('A', 'B'), ncol = 1)
dev.off()
system('dx upload ~/obs_rel_var_r2_comp.png --path mind_the_gap/results/')

# Compare squared correlation between PGS and observed relative R2
ggplot(results_dt[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & results_dt$r2_baseline_pheno > 0.01 & results_dt$population == 'AFR', ], 
       aes(x = cor_baseline_masked_sq, y = obs_rel_r2, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = cor_baseline_masked_sq_low_ci, 
                    xmax = cor_baseline_masked_sq_high_ci), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_r2_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_r2_high_ci), width = 0) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = expression(Squared~Score~Correlation~(Cor(s, s*minute)^2)),
        y = expression(Relative~Phenotypic~R^2~(R[s*minute]^2 / R[s]^2)),
        colour = NULL)

# Compare squared correlation between PGS and observed relative R2
p1 <- ggplot(results_dt[pgs_method == 'pT+clump' & population == 'EUR' & grepl('0_1_', results_dt$param), ], 
       aes(x = cor_baseline_masked_sq, y = obs_rel_r2, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = cor_baseline_masked_sq_low_ci, 
                    xmax = cor_baseline_masked_sq_high_ci), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_r2_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_r2_high_ci), width = 0) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
#  coord_fixed() +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = expression(Observed~Cor(s, s*minute)^2),
        y = expression(Observed~R[s*minute]^2 / R[s]^2),
       colour = NULL)

# Add titles to p1 and p2
p1 <- p1 + labs(title = 'pT+clump: INFO-based masking')
p2 <- p2 + labs(title = 'SBayesRC: INFO-based masking')

png('~/obs_rel_r2_comp_info_masking_ptclump.png', res = 300, width = 2750, height = 2500, units = 'px')
plot_grid(p1, p2, labels = c('A', 'B'), ncol = 1)
dev.off()
system('dx upload ~/obs_rel_r2_comp_info_masking_ptclump.png --path mind_the_gap/results/')

# Plot the PGS slope with phenotype using baseline, masked PGS, and masked PGS after correction based on relative var and cor(s,s')^2
results_dt$call_rate <- factor(results_dt$call_rate, levels = c("Call rate = 0.5", "Call rate = 0.75", "Call rate = 0.95"))

# Reshape the data from wide to long format
plot_data <- melt(results_dt,
     id.vars = c("trait", "population", "pgs_method", "call_rate"),
     measure.vars = list(
         slope_ratio = c("beta_naive_ratio", "beta_corrected_ratio"),
         low_ci = c("beta_naive_ratio_low_ci", "beta_corrected_ratio_low_ci"),
         high_ci = c("beta_naive_ratio_high_ci", "beta_corrected_ratio_high_ci")
     ),
     variable.name = "model_type_index", # This will be 1 or 2
     value.name = c("slope_ratio", "low_ci", "high_ci")
)

# Map the numeric index to a clean factor name
plot_data[, model_type := factor(ifelse(model_type_index == 1, "Naive", "Corrected"),  levels = c("Naive", "Corrected"))]

# --- 3. Create the Plot ---
plot_slope_comparison <- ggplot(
  plot_data[plot_data$pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & plot_data$population == 'EUR',], 
  aes(x = slope_ratio, 
      y = trait, 
      color = model_type)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1.0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = low_ci, xmax = high_ci), 
                 height = 0, 
                 position = position_dodge(width = 0.6),
                 alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  facet_grid(~ call_rate) +
  labs(
      x = "Slope Ratio (Estimated Slope / True Slope)",
      y = "Trait",
      color = "Model Type"
  ) +
  theme_half_open() +
  background_grid(major = "x") +
  panel_border()

```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot) # For theme_half_open()
library(stringr) # For str_detect()
library(dplyr)   # For percent_rank()

# --- 1. Define Example Parameters ---
example_trait <- 'BMI'
example_pop <- 'EUR'
example_method <- 'SBayesRC' # Case-insensitive, 'sbayesrc' also works

# Define paths and proportions
base_dir_baseline <- '~/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/baseline/'
base_dir_masked <- '~/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/masked/'
props <- c(0.05, 0.25, 0.5)

# This list will hold the binned data for each 'prop'
plot_data_list <- list()

print(paste("Generating STANDARDIZED percentile plot for:", example_trait, "in", example_pop))

# --- 2. Find the correct column name ---
temp_baseline_file <- paste0(base_dir_baseline, 'ukb.', example_pop, '.sparse.sscore')
if (!file.exists(temp_baseline_file)) {
  stop(paste("Could not find file to get column names:", temp_baseline_file))
}
all_cols <- names(fread(temp_baseline_file, nrows = 0))

param_col <- all_cols[
  str_detect(all_cols, example_trait) & 
  str_detect(all_cols, fixed(example_method, ignore_case = TRUE)) & 
  str_detect(all_cols, 'SUM')
]

if (length(param_col) == 0) {
  stop(paste("Could not find a matching score column for", example_trait, "and", example_method))
}
param_col <- param_col[1]
print(paste("Found matching score column:", param_col))


# --- 3. Loop through props to get data ---
for (prop in props) {
  print(paste("Processing prop:", prop))
  
  # Define file paths
  baseline_file <- paste0(base_dir_baseline, 'ukb.', example_pop, '.sparse.sscore')
  masked_file <- paste0(base_dir_masked, 'ukb.', example_pop, '.sparse.prop_', prop, '.sscore')
  
  if (!file.exists(baseline_file) || !file.exists(masked_file)) {
    print(paste("Skipping prop", prop, "- files not found"))
    next
  }
  
  # Load only the columns we need
  pgs_baseline <- fread(baseline_file, select = c("IID", param_col))
  pgs_masked <- fread(masked_file, select = c("IID", param_col))
  
  setnames(pgs_baseline, param_col, "pgs_s")
  setnames(pgs_masked, param_col, "pgs_s_prime")
  
  # Merge to align individuals
  percentile_df <- merge(pgs_baseline, pgs_masked, by = "IID")
  
  if (nrow(percentile_df) == 0) {
    print(paste("Skipping prop", prop, "- no individuals in common"))
    next
  }
  
  # --- NEW LOGIC ---
  
  # 1. Create the "True Percentile Rank" from the baseline score (s)
  percentile_df[, rank_true := percent_rank(pgs_s)]
  
  # 2. Create an Empirical CDF function from the *baseline* (s) distribution.
  #    This function now maps any score *value* to its percentile *on the baseline distribution*.
  ecdf_baseline <- ecdf(percentile_df$pgs_s)
  
  # 3. Apply this function to the *masked score values* (s').
  #    This is the "Observed Standardized Percentile"
  percentile_df[, rank_observed_std := ecdf_baseline(pgs_s_prime)]
  
  # --- End NEW LOGIC ---
  
  
  # --- Bin the data for a smooth plot ---
  percentile_df[, true_percentile_bin := cut(rank_true,
                                           breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.02),
                                           labels = FALSE,
                                           include.lowest = TRUE)]
  
  # Summarize by bin
  binned_percentiles <- percentile_df[, .(
    mean_true_rank = mean(rank_true, na.rm = TRUE),
    # Use our new standardized rank
    mean_observed_rank = mean(rank_observed_std, na.rm = TRUE) 
  ), by = true_percentile_bin]
  
  # Add metadata for plotting
  binned_percentiles$prop <- prop
  binned_percentiles$call_rate <- paste0('Call rate = ', 1 - prop)
  
  plot_data_list[[length(plot_data_list) + 1]] <- binned_percentiles
} # End of prop loop

# --- 4. Combine and Create Plot ---
if (length(plot_data_list) == 0) {
  stop("No data was successfully processed. Cannot create plot.")
}

plot_data <- rbindlist(plot_data_list)

# Factor call_rate to ensure correct panel order
plot_data$call_rate <- factor(plot_data$call_rate, 
                             levels = c("Call rate = 0.5", "Call rate = 0.75", "Call rate = 0.95"))

# Create the plot
plot_percentile_compression <- ggplot(plot_data, 
                                      aes(x = mean_true_rank, y = mean_observed_rank)) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line(color = "blue", size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~call_rate) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Standardized Percentile Compression for", example_trait),
    subtitle = paste("Showing", example_pop, "population,", example_method, "method"),
    x = "True Percentile",
    y = "Observed Percentile"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  theme_half_open() +
  background_grid(major = 'xy') +
  panel_border()

plot_percentile_compression
```

***

### Assess variability across iterations

```{bash}
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs.tar
```

```{r}

library(data.table)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(stringr)
library(foreach)
library(doMC)
registerDoMC(8)

# --- 1. CONFIGURATION ---

# Populations to analyze
# ORDER MATTERS: Run AFR first to get the sample size for downsampling EUR
populations <- c('AFR', 'EUR') 
traits <- c('HT', 'HB', 'PLT', 'BMI', 'BWT', 'MCHC', 'SBP', 'NEU', 'HDL', 'TC')

# File paths
base_dir_baseline <- '~/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/baseline/'
base_dir_masked <- '~/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/masked/'
pheno_dir <- '/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/phenotype/'

# Simulation parameters
props <- c(0.05, 0.25, 0.5) # Proportions of missingness
n_iterations <- 10          # Number of random masking iterations per trait/prop
n_boot <- 5               # Bootstrap replicates for individual CIs

# Variable to store AFR sample size dynamically
n_downsample_target <- NULL 

set.seed(123)

# List to collect results
final_results_list <- list()

# --- 2. OUTER LOOP: POPULATIONS ---
for (pop in populations) {
    print(paste("Processing Population:", pop))
  
  for (prop in props) {
    print(paste("Processing prop:", prop))
    
    # Check baseline file existence
    baseline_file <- paste0(base_dir_baseline, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.sscore')
    if (!file.exists(baseline_file)) {
        print(paste("Skipping baseline not found:", baseline_file))
        next
    }
    pgs_baseline <- fread(baseline_file)
    
    # --- 3. INNER LOOP: TRAITS (Parallel) ---
    trait_results_list <- foreach(
        trait = traits,
        .combine = 'append',
        .packages = 'data.table',
        .export = c('pheno_dir', 'base_dir_masked', 'pgs_baseline', 'pop', 'prop', 'n_iterations', 'n_boot', 'n_downsample_target')
    ) %dopar% {
        
        # Load Phenotype
        pheno_file <- paste0(pheno_dir, trait, '.', pop, '.txt')
        if (!file.exists(pheno_file)) return(list())
        pheno <- fread(pheno_file)

        # Extract relevant PGS column for this trait from baseline
        pgs_cols <- names(pgs_baseline)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_baseline)) & grepl(trait, names(pgs_baseline))]
        
        param_results <- list()
        
        for (param in pgs_cols) {
            # Subset baseline data for this specific parameter
            pgs_base_sub <- pgs_baseline[, c('IID', param), with=FALSE]
            
            # Merge with phenotype (Complete cases only)
            base_merged <- merge(pheno, pgs_base_sub, by='IID', sort=FALSE)
            
            # --- ITERATION LOOP (Random Masking) ---
            for (iter in 1:n_iterations) {
                
                # Load masked file for this iteration
                masked_file <- paste0(base_dir_masked, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.random.prop_', prop, '.iteration_', iter, '.sscore')
                if (!file.exists(masked_file)) next
                
                pgs_masked <- fread(masked_file)
                if (!param %in% names(pgs_masked)) next
                
                # Merge masked data
                pgs_mask_sub <- pgs_masked[, c('IID', param), with=FALSE]
                full_data <- merge(base_merged, pgs_mask_sub, by='IID', suffixes=c("", "_masked"))
                
                # Define data subsets to analyze
                analysis_sets <- list(list(type="Full", data=full_data))
                
                if (pop == 'EUR') {
                     # Fallback if variable wasn't set (e.g. running EUR first)
                     target_n <- if(!is.null(n_downsample_target)) n_downsample_target else 2000 
                     
                     if (nrow(full_data) > target_n) {
                        down_idx <- sample(nrow(full_data), target_n)
                        analysis_sets[[2]] <- list(type="Downsampled", data=full_data[down_idx, ])
                     }
                }
                
                # --- ANALYSIS LOOP (Full vs Downsampled) ---
                for (aset in analysis_sets) {
                    df <- aset$data
                    n_curr <- nrow(df)
                    if (n_curr < 10) next 
                    
                    # Extract vectors for speed
                    y <- df[['outcome']]
                    s <- df[[param]]              # Perfect PGS
                    s_prime <- df[[paste0(param, "_masked")]] # Imperfect PGS
                    
                    # --- A. Point Estimates ---
                    r2_s <- cor(y, s)^2
                    r2_s_prime <- cor(y, s_prime)^2
                    
                    obs_rel_r2 <- r2_s_prime / r2_s
                    est_rel_r2 <- cor(s, s_prime)^2 
                    
                    var_s <- var(s)
                    var_s_prime <- var(s_prime)
                    obs_rel_var <- var_s_prime / var_s
                    
                    error <- est_rel_r2 - obs_rel_r2
                    
                    # --- B. Bootstrap for CIs ---
                    boot_res <- replicate(n_boot, {
                        idx <- sample(n_curr, n_curr, replace=TRUE)
                        y_b <- y[idx]; s_b <- s[idx]; sp_b <- s_prime[idx]
                        
                        r2_s_b <- cor(y_b, s_b)^2
                        r2_sp_b <- cor(y_b, sp_b)^2
                        cor_ss_b <- cor(s_b, sp_b)^2
                        
                        rel_r2_b <- if(r2_s_b > 1e-6) r2_sp_b/r2_s_b else NA
                        return(c(rel_r2=rel_r2_b, est=cor_ss_b))
                    })
                    
                    ci_rel_r2 <- quantile(boot_res["rel_r2",], probs=c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm=TRUE)
                    
                    # Store Result
                    param_results[[length(param_results) + 1]] <- data.table(
                        population = pop,
                        trait = trait,
                        param = param,
                        pgs_method = ifelse(grepl('sbayesrc', param), 'SBayesRC', 'pT+clump'),
                        prop_missing = prop,
                        iteration = iter,
                        sample_type = aset$type, 
                        n_samples = n_curr,
                        
                        # --- Main Metrics ---
                        r2_baseline_pheno = r2_s, # <--- ADDED: Baseline R2
                        obs_rel_r2 = obs_rel_r2,
                        est_rel_r2 = est_rel_r2,
                        obs_rel_var = obs_rel_var,
                        
                        # Error Metrics
                        error = error,
                        abs_error = abs(error),
                        sq_error = error^2,
                        
                        # CIs
                        rel_r2_low = ci_rel_r2[1],
                        rel_r2_high = ci_rel_r2[2]
                    )
                } 
            }
        }
        return(param_results)
    }
    
    # --- Capture Sample Size from AFR run ---
    if (pop == 'AFR' && length(trait_results_list) > 0) {
        temp_dt <- rbindlist(trait_results_list, fill=TRUE)
        if (nrow(temp_dt) > 0) {
            n_downsample_target <- median(temp_dt$n_samples, na.rm=TRUE)
            print(paste("Set downsampling target for EUR based on AFR N:", n_downsample_target))
        }
    }
    
    if (length(trait_results_list) > 0) {
        final_results_list <- append(final_results_list, trait_results_list)
    }
  }
}

# Combine all results
results_dt <- rbindlist(final_results_list)

# Identify PGS method
results_dt[, pgs_method := ifelse(str_detect(param, 'sbayesrc'), 'SBayesRC', 'pT+clump')]
results_dt$call_rate <- paste0('Call rate = ', 1 - results_dt$prop)

write.csv(results_dt, '~/wgs_sparse_results_10it.csv', row.names=F)
system('dx upload ~/wgs_sparse_results_10it.csv --path mind_the_gap/results/')
results_dt <- fread('/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/results/wgs_sparse_results_10it.csv')

results_dt$param<-gsub('_SUM','',results_dt$param)
results_dt$param<-gsub('.*SCORE_','',results_dt$param)
results_dt$param<-gsub('0_','',results_dt$param)
results_dt$param[results_dt$pgs_method == 'SBayesRC'] <- ''
results_dt$param <- factor(results_dt$param, levels = unique(results_dt$param))
results_dt <- results_dt[results_dt$param %in% c("1", ""),]

# Compare observed relative R2 and relative variance
p1 <- ggplot(results_dt[results_dt$population == 'EUR', ], 
       aes(x = mean_rel_var, y = mean_rel_r2, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = rel_var_low, 
                    xmax = rel_var_high), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_r2_low, 
                    ymax = rel_r2_high), width = 0) +
  facet_grid(pgs_method ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = expression(Var[s*minute] / Var[s]),
        y = expression(R[s*minute]^2 / R[s]^2),
        colour = NULL)

png('~/obs_rel_var_r2_comp.png', res = 300, width = 3000, height = 1500, units = 'px')
p1
dev.off()
system('dx upload ~/obs_rel_var_r2_comp.png --path mind_the_gap/results/')

# Compare squared correlation between PGS and observed relative R2
p2 <- ggplot(results_dt[results_dt$pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & results_dt$r2_baseline_pheno > 0.01, ], 
       aes(x = mean_cor_sq, y = mean_rel_r2, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = cor_sq_low, 
                    xmax = cor_sq_high), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_r2_low, 
                    ymax = rel_r2_high), width = 0) +
  facet_grid(population ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = expression(Cor(s, s*minute)^2),
        y = expression(R[s*minute]^2 / R[s]^2),
        colour = NULL)

png('~/obs_rel_r2_comp.png', res = 300, width = 3000, height = 1500, units = 'px')
p2
dev.off()
system('dx upload ~/obs_rel_r2_comp.png --path mind_the_gap/results/')

```

***

### Evaluate recovered PGS score files

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(stringr)
library(foreach)
library(doMC)
registerDoMC(8)

# --- 1. Data Processing Loop ---
# This section is an enhanced version of your original code.

# Define analysis parameters
populations <- c('EUR')
traits <- c('HT', 'HB', 'PLT', 'BMI', 'BWT', 'MCHC', 'SBP', 'NEU', 'HDL', 'TC')
base_dir_baseline <- '~/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/baseline/'
base_dir_masked <- '~/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/masked/'
pheno_dir <- '/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/phenotype/'
props <- c(0.05, 0.25, 0.5)

n_boot <- 5 # Number of bootstrap replicates
set.seed(123)  # For reproducible results

# Create the list to hold all results
final_results_list <- list()

# --- 2. RUN SEQUENTIAL OUTER LOOP (for pop) ---
for (pop in populations) {
  print(paste("Processing Population:", pop))
  
  # Read in baseline PGS
  baseline_file <- paste0(base_dir_baseline, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.sscore')
  pgs_baseline <- fread(baseline_file)
  
  # Read in PGS from recovered score file
  recovered_pgs_all <-fread('/home/rstudio-server/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/recovered/ukb.EUR.sparse.sscore')
  
  for (prop in props) {
    print(paste("Processing prop:", prop))
    
    # Read in masked PGS
    masked_file <- paste0(base_dir_masked, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.prop_', prop, '.sscore')
    pgs_masked <- fread(masked_file)

    # Subset set recovered PGS to corresponding proportion of masking
    pgs_recovered <- recovered_pgs_all[, c('IID', names(recovered_pgs_all)[grepl(paste0('rsq_', prop, '_SUM'), names(recovered_pgs_all))]), with = F]
    names(pgs_recovered) <- gsub(paste0('_rsq_', prop), '', names(pgs_recovered))
    
    # Identify overlapping individuals
    pgs_baseline <- pgs_baseline[pgs_baseline$IID %in% pgs_masked$IID, ]
    pgs_masked <- pgs_masked[pgs_masked$IID %in% pgs_baseline$IID, ]
    pgs_recovered <- pgs_recovered[pgs_recovered$IID %in% pgs_masked$IID, ]

    # --- 3. RUN PARALLEL INNER LOOP (for trait) ---
    trait_results_list <- foreach(
        trait = traits,
        .combine = 'append', 
        .packages = 'data.table',
        .export = c('pheno_dir', 'n_boot', 'pgs_baseline', 'pgs_masked', 'pop') 
    ) %dopar% {
        
        pheno_file <- paste0(pheno_dir, trait, '.', pop, '.txt')
        if (!file.exists(pheno_file)) {
            return(list()) 
        }
        
        pheno <- fread(pheno_file)

        # Subset PGS data
        pgs_baseline_i <- pgs_baseline[, c('IID', names(pgs_baseline)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_baseline)) &
                                                                        grepl(trait, names(pgs_baseline))]), with = F]
        pgs_masked_i <- pgs_masked[, c('IID', names(pgs_masked)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_masked)) &
                                                                    grepl(trait, names(pgs_masked))]), with = F]
        pgs_recovered_i <- pgs_recovered[, c('IID', names(pgs_recovered)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_recovered)) &
                                                                    grepl(trait, names(pgs_recovered))]), with = F]
        
        # Merge PGS data
        pgs_baseline_pheno <- merge(pheno, pgs_baseline_i, by = 'IID', sort = FALSE)
        pgs_masked_pheno <- merge(pheno, pgs_masked_i, by = 'IID', sort = FALSE)
        pgs_recovered_pheno <- merge(pheno, pgs_recovered_i, by = 'IID', sort = FALSE)
        
        # --- NEW: CRITICAL ALIGNMENT STEP ---
        # Ensure both data.tables have the same individuals in the same order
        common_iids <- Reduce(intersect, list(pgs_baseline_pheno$IID, 
                                              pgs_masked_pheno$IID, 
                                              pgs_recovered_pheno$IID))

        pgs_baseline_pheno <- pgs_baseline_pheno[IID %in% common_iids][order(IID)]
        pgs_masked_pheno <- pgs_masked_pheno[IID %in% common_iids][order(IID)]
        pgs_recovered_pheno <- pgs_recovered_pheno[IID %in% common_iids][order(IID)]

        # Restrict to common parameters
        common_params <- Reduce(intersect, list(names(pgs_baseline_i)[-1], 
                                                names(pgs_masked_i)[-1], 
                                                names(pgs_recovered_i)[-1]))

        pgs_baseline_pheno <- pgs_baseline_pheno[, c('IID', 'outcome', common_params), with = F]
        pgs_masked_pheno <- pgs_masked_pheno[, c('IID', 'outcome', common_params), with = F]
        pgs_recovered_pheno <- pgs_recovered_pheno[, c('IID', 'outcome', common_params), with = F]

        param_cols <- names(pgs_baseline_i)[-1]
        param_results_list <- list() 

        for (param in common_params) {
            if (!(param %in% names(pgs_masked_pheno))) next
            
            n <- nrow(pgs_baseline_pheno)
            if (n == 0) next 
            
            # --- 1.5. BOOTSTRAPPING SECTION ---
            boot_stats <- replicate(n_boot, {
                indices <- sample(1:n, n, replace = TRUE)
                
                # Thanks to alignment, we can use indices on both
                boot_base <- pgs_baseline_pheno[indices]
                boot_masked <- pgs_masked_pheno[indices]
                boot_recovered <- pgs_recovered_pheno[indices]
                
                # And we can use a single pheno vector
                pheno_vals_boot <- boot_base[['outcome']]
                pgs_vals_base <- boot_base[[param]]
                pgs_vals_masked <- boot_masked[[param]]
                pgs_vals_recovered <- boot_recovered[[param]]
                
                # R2 stats
                r2_baseline_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pheno_vals_boot, pgs_vals_base)^2, error = function(e) NA)
                r2_masked_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pheno_vals_boot, pgs_vals_masked)^2, error = function(e) NA)
                r2_recovered_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pheno_vals_boot, pgs_vals_recovered)^2, error = function(e) NA)
                
                # Relative Variance
                var_baseline_boot <- tryCatch(var(pgs_vals_base), error = function(e) NA)
                var_masked_boot <- tryCatch(var(pgs_vals_masked), error = function(e) NA)
                var_recovered_boot <- tryCatch(var(pgs_vals_recovered), error = function(e) NA)
                
                rel_var_masked_boot <- if (is.na(var_baseline_boot) || is.na(var_masked_boot) || var_baseline_boot == 0) {
                    NA
                } else {
                    var_masked_boot / var_baseline_boot
                }
                
                rel_var_recovered_boot <- if (is.na(var_baseline_boot) || is.na(var_recovered_boot) || var_baseline_boot == 0) {
                    NA
                } else {
                    var_recovered_boot / var_baseline_boot
                }
                
                # Correlation stat
                cor_baseline_masked_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pgs_vals_base, pgs_vals_masked), error = function(e) NA)
                cor_baseline_masked_sq_boot <- cor_baseline_masked_boot^2

                cor_baseline_recovered_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pgs_vals_base, pgs_vals_recovered), error = function(e) NA)
                cor_baseline_recovered_sq_boot <- cor_baseline_recovered_boot^2
                
                # Relative R2
                rel_r2_masked_boot <- if (is.na(r2_baseline_boot) || is.na(r2_masked_boot) || r2_baseline_boot == 0) {
                    NA
                } else {
                    r2_masked_boot / r2_baseline_boot
                }
                
                rel_r2_recovered_boot <- if (is.na(r2_baseline_boot) || is.na(r2_recovered_boot) || r2_baseline_boot == 0) {
                    NA
                } else {
                    r2_recovered_boot / r2_baseline_boot
                }
                
                # Return a named vector
                c(
                    r2_baseline = r2_baseline_boot,
                    r2_masked = r2_masked_boot,
                    r2_recovered = r2_recovered_boot,
                    rel_var_masked = rel_var_masked_boot,
                    rel_var_recovered = rel_var_recovered_boot,
                    cor_baseline_masked = cor_baseline_masked_boot,
                    cor_baseline_masked_sq = cor_baseline_masked_sq_boot,
                    cor_baseline_recovered = cor_baseline_recovered_boot,
                    cor_baseline_recovered_sq = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_boot,
                    rel_r2_masked = rel_r2_masked_boot,
                    rel_r2_recovered = rel_r2_recovered_boot
                )
            })
            
            # Transpose boot_stats
            boot_stats_t <- t(boot_stats)
            
            # --- Calculate 95% CIs ---
            safe_quantile <- function(col_name) {
                # Add an extra safety check for all-NA columns
                if (!col_name %in% colnames(boot_stats_t) || all(is.na(boot_stats_t[, col_name]))) {
                    return(c(NA, NA))
                }
                quantile(boot_stats_t[, col_name], c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
            }
            
            r2_baseline_ci <- safe_quantile("r2_baseline")
            r2_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("r2_masked")
            r2_recovered_ci <- safe_quantile("r2_recovered")
            rel_var_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_var_masked")
            rel_var_recovered_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_var_recovered")
            cor_baseline_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_masked")
            cor_baseline_masked_sq_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_masked_sq")
            cor_baseline_recovered_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_recovered")
            cor_baseline_recovered_sq_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_recovered_sq")
            rel_r2_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_r2_masked")
            rel_r2_recovered_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_r2_recovered")
            # --- END BOOTSTRAPPING ---
            
            # --- 1.6. Calculate Point Estimates ---
            pheno_point <- pgs_baseline_pheno[['outcome']]
            pgs_s_point <- pgs_baseline_pheno[[param]]
            pgs_s_prime_point <- pgs_masked_pheno[[param]]
            pgs_s_rec_point <- pgs_recovered_pheno[[param]]
            
            r2_baseline_pheno <- cor(pheno_point, pgs_s_point)^2
            r2_masked_pheno <- cor(pheno_point, pgs_s_prime_point)^2
            r2_recovered_pheno <- cor(pheno_point, pgs_s_rec_point)^2
            p_val <- coef(summary(lm(pheno_point ~ pgs_s_point)))[2,4]
            
            cor_baseline_masked <- cor(pgs_s_point, pgs_s_prime_point)
            cor_baseline_masked_sq <- cor_baseline_masked^2
            cor_baseline_recovered <- cor(pgs_s_point, pgs_s_rec_point)
            cor_baseline_recovered_sq <- cor_baseline_recovered^2
            
            var_baseline <- var(pgs_s_point)
            var_masked <- var(pgs_s_prime_point)
            var_recovered <- var(pgs_s_rec_point)
            rel_var_masked_point <- var_masked / var_baseline
            rel_var_recovered_point <- var_recovered / var_baseline

            # --- 1.7. Store results ---
            param_results_list[[length(param_results_list) + 1]] <- data.table(
                param = param,
                trait = trait,
                population = pop,
                prop = prop,
                var_baseline = var_baseline,
                var_masked = var_masked,
                var_recovered = var_recovered,
                r2_baseline_pheno = r2_baseline_pheno,
                r2_masked_pheno = r2_masked_pheno,
                r2_recovered_pheno = r2_recovered_pheno,
                cor_baseline_masked = cor_baseline_masked,
                cor_baseline_masked_sq = cor_baseline_masked_sq,
                cor_baseline_recovered = cor_baseline_recovered,
                cor_baseline_recovered_sq = cor_baseline_recovered_sq,
                obs_rel_masked_r2 = r2_masked_pheno / r2_baseline_pheno,
                obs_rel_masked_var = rel_var_masked_point,
                obs_rel_recovered_r2 = r2_recovered_pheno / r2_baseline_pheno,
                obs_rel_recovered_var = rel_var_recovered_point,
                p_baseline_pheno = p_val,
                n = nrow(pgs_baseline_pheno),
                r2_baseline_low_ci = r2_baseline_ci[1],
                r2_baseline_high_ci = r2_baseline_ci[2],
                r2_masked_low_ci = r2_masked_ci[1],
                r2_masked_high_ci = r2_masked_ci[2],
                r2_recovered_low_ci = r2_recovered_ci[1],
                r2_recovered_high_ci = r2_recovered_ci[2],
                rel_var_masked_low_ci = rel_var_masked_ci[1],
                rel_var_masked_high_ci = rel_var_masked_ci[2],
                rel_var_recovered_low_ci = rel_var_recovered_ci[1],
                rel_var_recovered_high_ci = rel_var_recovered_ci[2],
                cor_baseline_masked_low_ci = cor_baseline_masked_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_masked_high_ci = cor_baseline_masked_ci[2],
                cor_baseline_masked_sq_low_ci = cor_baseline_masked_sq_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_masked_sq_high_ci = cor_baseline_masked_sq_ci[2],
                cor_baseline_recovered_low_ci = cor_baseline_recovered_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_recovered_high_ci = cor_baseline_recovered_ci[2],
                cor_baseline_recovered_sq_low_ci = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_recovered_sq_high_ci = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_ci[2],
                rel_r2_masked_low_ci = rel_r2_masked_ci[1],
                rel_r2_masked_high_ci = rel_r2_masked_ci[2],
                rel_r2_recovered_low_ci = rel_r2_recovered_ci[1],
                rel_r2_recovered_high_ci = rel_r2_recovered_ci[2]
            )
        } # End of param loop
        
        # The parallel worker returns the list of data.tables for this trait
        return(param_results_list) 
        
    } # End of parallel trait loop

    # --- 4. COMBINE RESULTS (within sequential loop) ---
    if (length(trait_results_list) > 0) {
        final_results_list <- append(final_results_list, trait_results_list)
    }
  } # End of prop loop

} # End of sequential pop loop

results_dt <- rbindlist(final_results_list)
results_dt[, pgs_method := ifelse(str_detect(param, 'sbayesrc'), 'SBayesRC', 'pT+clump')]
results_dt$call_rate<-paste0('Call rate = ', 1-results_dt$prop)

write.csv(results_dt, '~/wgs_sparse_recovered_results.csv', row.names=F)
system('dx upload ~/wgs_sparse_recovered_results.csv --path mind_the_gap/results/')
results_dt <- fread('/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/results/wgs_sparse_recovered_results.csv')

# Calculate mean recovery
mean((1 - results_dt$obs_rel_recovered_r2) / (1 - results_dt$obs_rel_masked_r2)) # 0.3685
mean((1 - results_dt$obs_rel_recovered_var) / (1 - results_dt$obs_rel_masked_var)) # 0.2690495

# Plot relative R2 and variance of masked and baseline PGS
plot_data <- melt(results_dt,
     id.vars = c("trait", "population", "pgs_method", "call_rate"),
     measure.vars = list(
         rel_r2 = c("obs_rel_masked_r2", "obs_rel_recovered_r2"),
         rel_r2_low_ci = c("rel_r2_masked_low_ci", "rel_r2_recovered_low_ci"),
         rel_r2_high_ci = c("rel_r2_masked_high_ci", "rel_r2_recovered_high_ci"),
         rel_var = c("obs_rel_masked_var", "obs_rel_recovered_var"),
         rel_var_low_ci = c("rel_var_masked_low_ci", "rel_var_recovered_low_ci"),
         rel_var_high_ci = c("rel_var_masked_high_ci", "rel_var_recovered_high_ci"),
         r2_baseline = c("cor_baseline_masked_sq", "cor_baseline_recovered_sq"),
         r2_baseline_low_ci = c("cor_baseline_masked_sq_low_ci", "cor_baseline_recovered_sq_low_ci"),
         r2_baseline_high_ci = c("cor_baseline_masked_sq_high_ci", "cor_baseline_recovered_sq_high_ci")
     ),
     variable.name = "model",
     value.name = c("rel_r2", "rel_r2_low_ci", "rel_r2_high_ci","rel_var", "rel_var_low_ci", "rel_var_high_ci", 'r2_baseline', 'r2_baseline_low_ci','r2_baseline_high_ci')
)

# Map the numeric index to a clean factor name
plot_data[, model := factor(plot_data$model,  labels = c("Masked", "Recovered"))]
       
p1 <- ggplot(plot_data[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & results_dt$population == 'EUR', ], 
       aes(x = trait, y = rel_r2, colour = model)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_r2_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_r2_high_ci)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Trait", 
       y = expression(Observed~R[s*minute]^2 / R[s]^2),
       title = 'SBayesRC: INFO-based masking',
       colour = NULL)

p2 <- ggplot(plot_data[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & results_dt$population == 'EUR', ], 
       aes(x = trait, y = rel_var, colour = model)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_var_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_var_high_ci)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Trait", 
       y = expression(Observed~Var[s*minute] / Var[s]),
       title = 'SBayesRC: INFO-based masking',
       colour = NULL)

p3 <- ggplot(plot_data[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & results_dt$population == 'EUR', ], 
       aes(x = trait, y = r2_baseline, colour = model)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = r2_baseline_low_ci, 
                    ymax = r2_baseline_high_ci)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Trait", 
       y = expression(Observed~Cor(s, s*minute)^2),
       title = 'SBayesRC: INFO-based masking',
       colour = NULL)

png('~/obs_rel_var_r2_recovered_comp.png', res = 300, width = 2750, height = 2500, units = 'px')
plot_grid(p1, p2, p3, labels = c('A', 'B', 'C'), ncol = 1)
dev.off()
system('dx upload ~/obs_rel_var_r2_recovered_comp.png --path mind_the_gap/results/')

#######
# Compare estimated and observed relative variance and cor(s,s')^2 for recovered PGS
#######

# Read in estimated relative variance and cor(s,s')
est_dat <- fread('/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/results/est_rsq.wgs.sparse.recovered.txt')
est_dat<-est_dat[, c('beta_set','var_baseline','var_imputed','relative_variance','cor2_baseline_imputed','prop'), with = F]
names(est_dat)<-c('param','est_var_baseline','est_var_imputed','est_rel_var', 'cor2_baseline_imputed', 'prop')
est_dat$param<-paste0(est_dat$param, '_SUM')

results_dt_est <- merge(results_dt, est_dat, by = c('param','prop'))

# Compare estimated and observed relative R2
# Compare estimated and observed relative R2
p1 <- ggplot(results_dt_est[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & results_dt_est$population == 'EUR', ], 
       aes(x = cor_baseline_recovered_sq, y = obs_rel_recovered_r2, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_low_ci, 
                    xmax = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_high_ci), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_r2_recovered_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_r2_recovered_high_ci), width = 0) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = expression(Observed~Cor(s, s*minute)^2),
        y = expression(Observed~R[s*minute]^2 / R[s]^2),
        colour = NULL)

# Compare estimated and observed relative R2
p2 <- ggplot(results_dt_est[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & results_dt_est$population == 'EUR', ], 
       aes(x = cor2_baseline_imputed, y = cor_baseline_recovered_sq, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_low_ci, 
                    ymax = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_high_ci), width = 0) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = expression(Estimated~Cor(s, s*minute)^2),
        y = expression(Observed~Cor(s, s*minute)^2),
        colour = NULL)

p3 <- ggplot(results_dt_est[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & results_dt_est$population == 'EUR', ], 
       aes(x = est_rel_var, y = obs_rel_recovered_var, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_var_recovered_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_var_recovered_high_ci), width = 0) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = expression(Estimated~Var[s*minute] / Var[s]),
        y = expression(Observed~Var[s*minute] / Var[s]),
        colour = NULL)

png('~/obs_est_rel_var_r2_comp_sparse_sbayesrc_recovered.png', res = 300, width = 2750, height = 3850, units = 'px')
plot_grid(p1, p2, p3, labels = c('A', 'B', 'C'), ncol = 1)
dev.off()
system('dx upload ~/obs_est_rel_var_r2_comp_sparse_sbayesrc_recovered.png --path mind_the_gap/results/')

png('~/obs_est_rel_var_r2_comp_sparse_sbayesrc_recovered_small.png', res = 300, width = 2750, height = 2500, units = 'px')
plot_grid(p2, p3, labels = c('A', 'B'), ncol = 1)
dev.off()
system('dx upload ~/obs_est_rel_var_r2_comp_sparse_sbayesrc_recovered_small.png --path mind_the_gap/results/')

```

***

### Evaluate recovered PGS score files (r implementation)

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(stringr)
library(foreach)
library(doMC)
registerDoMC(8)

# --- 1. Data Processing Loop ---
# This section is an enhanced version of your original code.

# Define analysis parameters
populations <- c('EUR')
traits <- c('HT', 'HB', 'PLT', 'BMI', 'BWT', 'MCHC', 'SBP', 'NEU', 'HDL', 'TC')
base_dir_baseline <- '~/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/baseline/'
base_dir_masked <- '~/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/masked/'
pheno_dir <- '/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/phenotype/'
props <- c(0.05, 0.25, 0.5)

n_boot <- 1000 # Number of bootstrap replicates
set.seed(123)  # For reproducible results

# Create the list to hold all results
final_results_list <- list()

# --- 2. RUN SEQUENTIAL OUTER LOOP (for pop) ---
for (pop in populations) {
  print(paste("Processing Population:", pop))
  
  # Read in baseline PGS
  baseline_file <- paste0(base_dir_baseline, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.sscore')
  pgs_baseline <- fread(baseline_file)
  
  # Read in PGS from recovered score file
  recovered_pgs_all <-fread('/home/rstudio-server/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/recovered_rimp/ukb.EUR.sparse.sscore')
  
  for (prop in props) {
    print(paste("Processing prop:", prop))
    
    # Read in masked PGS
    masked_file <- paste0(base_dir_masked, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.prop_', prop, '.sscore')
    pgs_masked <- fread(masked_file)

    # Subset set recovered PGS to corresponding proportion of masking
    pgs_recovered <- recovered_pgs_all[, c('IID', names(recovered_pgs_all)[grepl(paste0('rsq_', prop, '_SUM'), names(recovered_pgs_all))]), with = F]
    names(pgs_recovered) <- gsub(paste0('_rsq_', prop), '', names(pgs_recovered))
    
    # Identify overlapping individuals
    pgs_baseline <- pgs_baseline[pgs_baseline$IID %in% pgs_masked$IID, ]
    pgs_masked <- pgs_masked[pgs_masked$IID %in% pgs_baseline$IID, ]
    pgs_recovered <- pgs_recovered[pgs_recovered$IID %in% pgs_masked$IID, ]

    # --- 3. RUN PARALLEL INNER LOOP (for trait) ---
    trait_results_list <- foreach(
        trait = traits,
        .combine = 'append', 
        .packages = 'data.table',
        .export = c('pheno_dir', 'n_boot', 'pgs_baseline', 'pgs_masked', 'pop') 
    ) %dopar% {
        
        pheno_file <- paste0(pheno_dir, trait, '.', pop, '.txt')
        if (!file.exists(pheno_file)) {
            return(list()) 
        }
        
        pheno <- fread(pheno_file)

        # Subset PGS data
        pgs_baseline_i <- pgs_baseline[, c('IID', names(pgs_baseline)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_baseline)) &
                                                                        grepl(trait, names(pgs_baseline))]), with = F]
        pgs_masked_i <- pgs_masked[, c('IID', names(pgs_masked)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_masked)) &
                                                                    grepl(trait, names(pgs_masked))]), with = F]
        pgs_recovered_i <- pgs_recovered[, c('IID', names(pgs_recovered)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_recovered)) &
                                                                    grepl(trait, names(pgs_recovered))]), with = F]
        
        # Merge PGS data
        pgs_baseline_pheno <- merge(pheno, pgs_baseline_i, by = 'IID', sort = FALSE)
        pgs_masked_pheno <- merge(pheno, pgs_masked_i, by = 'IID', sort = FALSE)
        pgs_recovered_pheno <- merge(pheno, pgs_recovered_i, by = 'IID', sort = FALSE)
        
        # --- NEW: CRITICAL ALIGNMENT STEP ---
        # Ensure both data.tables have the same individuals in the same order
        common_iids <- Reduce(intersect, list(pgs_baseline_pheno$IID, 
                                              pgs_masked_pheno$IID, 
                                              pgs_recovered_pheno$IID))

        pgs_baseline_pheno <- pgs_baseline_pheno[IID %in% common_iids][order(IID)]
        pgs_masked_pheno <- pgs_masked_pheno[IID %in% common_iids][order(IID)]
        pgs_recovered_pheno <- pgs_recovered_pheno[IID %in% common_iids][order(IID)]

        # Restrict to common parameters
        common_params <- Reduce(intersect, list(names(pgs_baseline_i)[-1], 
                                                names(pgs_masked_i)[-1], 
                                                names(pgs_recovered_i)[-1]))

        pgs_baseline_pheno <- pgs_baseline_pheno[, c('IID', 'outcome', common_params), with = F]
        pgs_masked_pheno <- pgs_masked_pheno[, c('IID', 'outcome', common_params), with = F]
        pgs_recovered_pheno <- pgs_recovered_pheno[, c('IID', 'outcome', common_params), with = F]

        param_cols <- names(pgs_baseline_i)[-1]
        param_results_list <- list() 

        for (param in common_params) {
            if (!(param %in% names(pgs_masked_pheno))) next
            
            n <- nrow(pgs_baseline_pheno)
            if (n == 0) next 
            
            # --- 1.5. BOOTSTRAPPING SECTION ---
            boot_stats <- replicate(n_boot, {
                indices <- sample(1:n, n, replace = TRUE)
                
                # Thanks to alignment, we can use indices on both
                boot_base <- pgs_baseline_pheno[indices]
                boot_masked <- pgs_masked_pheno[indices]
                boot_recovered <- pgs_recovered_pheno[indices]
                
                # And we can use a single pheno vector
                pheno_vals_boot <- boot_base[['outcome']]
                pgs_vals_base <- boot_base[[param]]
                pgs_vals_masked <- boot_masked[[param]]
                pgs_vals_recovered <- boot_recovered[[param]]
                
                # R2 stats
                r2_baseline_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pheno_vals_boot, pgs_vals_base)^2, error = function(e) NA)
                r2_masked_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pheno_vals_boot, pgs_vals_masked)^2, error = function(e) NA)
                r2_recovered_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pheno_vals_boot, pgs_vals_recovered)^2, error = function(e) NA)
                
                # Relative Variance
                var_baseline_boot <- tryCatch(var(pgs_vals_base), error = function(e) NA)
                var_masked_boot <- tryCatch(var(pgs_vals_masked), error = function(e) NA)
                var_recovered_boot <- tryCatch(var(pgs_vals_recovered), error = function(e) NA)
                
                rel_var_masked_boot <- if (is.na(var_baseline_boot) || is.na(var_masked_boot) || var_baseline_boot == 0) {
                    NA
                } else {
                    var_masked_boot / var_baseline_boot
                }
                
                rel_var_recovered_boot <- if (is.na(var_baseline_boot) || is.na(var_recovered_boot) || var_baseline_boot == 0) {
                    NA
                } else {
                    var_recovered_boot / var_baseline_boot
                }
                
                # Correlation stat
                cor_baseline_masked_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pgs_vals_base, pgs_vals_masked), error = function(e) NA)
                cor_baseline_masked_sq_boot <- cor_baseline_masked_boot^2

                cor_baseline_recovered_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pgs_vals_base, pgs_vals_recovered), error = function(e) NA)
                cor_baseline_recovered_sq_boot <- cor_baseline_recovered_boot^2
                
                # Relative R2
                rel_r2_masked_boot <- if (is.na(r2_baseline_boot) || is.na(r2_masked_boot) || r2_baseline_boot == 0) {
                    NA
                } else {
                    r2_masked_boot / r2_baseline_boot
                }
                
                rel_r2_recovered_boot <- if (is.na(r2_baseline_boot) || is.na(r2_recovered_boot) || r2_baseline_boot == 0) {
                    NA
                } else {
                    r2_recovered_boot / r2_baseline_boot
                }
                
                # Return a named vector
                c(
                    r2_baseline = r2_baseline_boot,
                    r2_masked = r2_masked_boot,
                    r2_recovered = r2_recovered_boot,
                    rel_var_masked = rel_var_masked_boot,
                    rel_var_recovered = rel_var_recovered_boot,
                    cor_baseline_masked = cor_baseline_masked_boot,
                    cor_baseline_masked_sq = cor_baseline_masked_sq_boot,
                    cor_baseline_recovered = cor_baseline_recovered_boot,
                    cor_baseline_recovered_sq = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_boot,
                    rel_r2_masked = rel_r2_masked_boot,
                    rel_r2_recovered = rel_r2_recovered_boot
                )
            })
            
            # Transpose boot_stats
            boot_stats_t <- t(boot_stats)
            
            # --- Calculate 95% CIs ---
            safe_quantile <- function(col_name) {
                # Add an extra safety check for all-NA columns
                if (!col_name %in% colnames(boot_stats_t) || all(is.na(boot_stats_t[, col_name]))) {
                    return(c(NA, NA))
                }
                quantile(boot_stats_t[, col_name], c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
            }
            
            r2_baseline_ci <- safe_quantile("r2_baseline")
            r2_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("r2_masked")
            r2_recovered_ci <- safe_quantile("r2_recovered")
            rel_var_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_var_masked")
            rel_var_recovered_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_var_recovered")
            cor_baseline_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_masked")
            cor_baseline_masked_sq_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_masked_sq")
            cor_baseline_recovered_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_recovered")
            cor_baseline_recovered_sq_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_recovered_sq")
            rel_r2_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_r2_masked")
            rel_r2_recovered_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_r2_recovered")
            # --- END BOOTSTRAPPING ---
            
            # --- 1.6. Calculate Point Estimates ---
            pheno_point <- pgs_baseline_pheno[['outcome']]
            pgs_s_point <- pgs_baseline_pheno[[param]]
            pgs_s_prime_point <- pgs_masked_pheno[[param]]
            pgs_s_rec_point <- pgs_recovered_pheno[[param]]
            
            r2_baseline_pheno <- cor(pheno_point, pgs_s_point)^2
            r2_masked_pheno <- cor(pheno_point, pgs_s_prime_point)^2
            r2_recovered_pheno <- cor(pheno_point, pgs_s_rec_point)^2
            p_val <- coef(summary(lm(pheno_point ~ pgs_s_point)))[2,4]
            
            cor_baseline_masked <- cor(pgs_s_point, pgs_s_prime_point)
            cor_baseline_masked_sq <- cor_baseline_masked^2
            cor_baseline_recovered <- cor(pgs_s_point, pgs_s_rec_point)
            cor_baseline_recovered_sq <- cor_baseline_recovered^2
            
            var_baseline <- var(pgs_s_point)
            var_masked <- var(pgs_s_prime_point)
            var_recovered <- var(pgs_s_rec_point)
```
