```{r}
            rel_var_masked_point <- var_masked / var_baseline
            rel_var_recovered_point <- var_recovered / var_baseline

            # --- 1.7. Store results ---
            param_results_list[[length(param_results_list) + 1]] <- data.table(
                param = param,
                trait = trait,
                population = pop,
                prop = prop,
                var_baseline = var_baseline,
                var_masked = var_masked,
                var_recovered = var_recovered,
                r2_baseline_pheno = r2_baseline_pheno,
                r2_masked_pheno = r2_masked_pheno,
                r2_recovered_pheno = r2_recovered_pheno,
                cor_baseline_masked = cor_baseline_masked,
                cor_baseline_masked_sq = cor_baseline_masked_sq,
                cor_baseline_recovered = cor_baseline_recovered,
                cor_baseline_recovered_sq = cor_baseline_recovered_sq,
                obs_rel_masked_r2 = r2_masked_pheno / r2_baseline_pheno,
                obs_rel_masked_var = rel_var_masked_point,
                obs_rel_recovered_r2 = r2_recovered_pheno / r2_baseline_pheno,
                obs_rel_recovered_var = rel_var_recovered_point,
                p_baseline_pheno = p_val,
                n = nrow(pgs_baseline_pheno),
                r2_baseline_low_ci = r2_baseline_ci[1],
                r2_baseline_high_ci = r2_baseline_ci[2],
                r2_masked_low_ci = r2_masked_ci[1],
                r2_masked_high_ci = r2_masked_ci[2],
                r2_recovered_low_ci = r2_recovered_ci[1],
                r2_recovered_high_ci = r2_recovered_ci[2],
                rel_var_masked_low_ci = rel_var_masked_ci[1],
                rel_var_masked_high_ci = rel_var_masked_ci[2],
                rel_var_recovered_low_ci = rel_var_recovered_ci[1],
                rel_var_recovered_high_ci = rel_var_recovered_ci[2],
                cor_baseline_masked_low_ci = cor_baseline_masked_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_masked_high_ci = cor_baseline_masked_ci[2],
                cor_baseline_masked_sq_low_ci = cor_baseline_masked_sq_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_masked_sq_high_ci = cor_baseline_masked_sq_ci[2],
                cor_baseline_recovered_low_ci = cor_baseline_recovered_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_recovered_high_ci = cor_baseline_recovered_ci[2],
                cor_baseline_recovered_sq_low_ci = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_recovered_sq_high_ci = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_ci[2],
                rel_r2_masked_low_ci = rel_r2_masked_ci[1],
                rel_r2_masked_high_ci = rel_r2_masked_ci[2],
                rel_r2_recovered_low_ci = rel_r2_recovered_ci[1],
                rel_r2_recovered_high_ci = rel_r2_recovered_ci[2]
            )
        } # End of param loop
        
        # The parallel worker returns the list of data.tables for this trait
        return(param_results_list) 
        
    } # End of parallel trait loop

    # --- 4. COMBINE RESULTS (within sequential loop) ---
    if (length(trait_results_list) > 0) {
        final_results_list <- append(final_results_list, trait_results_list)
    }
  } # End of prop loop

} # End of sequential pop loop

results_dt <- rbindlist(final_results_list)
results_dt[, pgs_method := ifelse(str_detect(param, 'sbayesrc'), 'SBayesRC', 'pT+clump')]
results_dt$call_rate<-paste0('Call rate = ', 1-results_dt$prop)

write.csv(results_dt, '~/wgs_sparse_recovered_results_rimp.csv', row.names=F)
system('dx upload ~/wgs_sparse_recovered_results_rimp.csv --path mind_the_gap/results/')
results_dt <- fread('/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/results/wgs_sparse_recovered_results_rimp.csv')

# Calculate mean recovery
mean((1 - results_dt$obs_rel_recovered_r2) / (1 - results_dt$obs_rel_masked_r2)) # 0.4026
mean((1 - results_dt$obs_rel_recovered_var) / (1 - results_dt$obs_rel_masked_var)) # 0.4140634

# Plot relative R2 and variance of masked and baseline PGS
plot_data <- melt(results_dt,
     id.vars = c("trait", "population", "pgs_method", "call_rate"),
     measure.vars = list(
         rel_r2 = c("obs_rel_masked_r2", "obs_rel_recovered_r2"),
         rel_r2_low_ci = c("rel_r2_masked_low_ci", "rel_r2_recovered_low_ci"),
         rel_r2_high_ci = c("rel_r2_masked_high_ci", "rel_r2_recovered_high_ci"),
         rel_var = c("obs_rel_masked_var", "obs_rel_recovered_var"),
         rel_var_low_ci = c("rel_var_masked_low_ci", "rel_var_recovered_low_ci"),
         rel_var_high_ci = c("rel_var_masked_high_ci", "rel_var_recovered_high_ci"),
         r2_baseline = c("cor_baseline_masked_sq", "cor_baseline_recovered_sq"),
         r2_baseline_low_ci = c("cor_baseline_masked_sq_low_ci", "cor_baseline_recovered_sq_low_ci"),
         r2_baseline_high_ci = c("cor_baseline_masked_sq_high_ci", "cor_baseline_recovered_sq_high_ci")
     ),
     variable.name = "model",
     value.name = c("rel_r2", "rel_r2_low_ci", "rel_r2_high_ci","rel_var", "rel_var_low_ci", "rel_var_high_ci", 'r2_baseline', 'r2_baseline_low_ci','r2_baseline_high_ci')
)

# Map the numeric index to a clean factor name
plot_data[, model := factor(plot_data$model,  labels = c("Masked", "Recovered"))]
       
p1 <- ggplot(plot_data[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & results_dt$population == 'EUR', ], 
       aes(x = trait, y = rel_r2, colour = model)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_r2_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_r2_high_ci)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Trait", 
       y = expression(Observed~R[s*minute]^2 / R[s]^2),
       title = 'SBayesRC: INFO-based masking',
       colour = NULL)

p2 <- ggplot(plot_data[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & results_dt$population == 'EUR', ], 
       aes(x = trait, y = rel_var, colour = model)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_var_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_var_high_ci)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Trait", 
       y = expression(Observed~Var[s*minute] / Var[s]),
       title = 'SBayesRC: INFO-based masking',
       colour = NULL)

p3 <- ggplot(plot_data[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & results_dt$population == 'EUR', ], 
       aes(x = trait, y = r2_baseline, colour = model)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = r2_baseline_low_ci, 
                    ymax = r2_baseline_high_ci)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Trait", 
       y = expression(Observed~Cor(s, s*minute)^2),
       title = 'SBayesRC: INFO-based masking',
       colour = NULL)

png('~/obs_rel_var_r2_recovered_comp_rimp.png', res = 300, width = 2750, height = 2500, units = 'px')
plot_grid(p1, p2, p3, labels = c('A', 'B', 'C'), ncol = 1)
dev.off()
system('dx upload ~/obs_rel_var_r2_recovered_comp_rimp.png --path mind_the_gap/results/')

# ptclump

p1_ptclump <- ggplot(plot_data[pgs_method == 'pT+clump' & results_dt$population == 'EUR' & grepl('0_1_', results_dt$param), ], 
       aes(x = trait, y = rel_r2, colour = model)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_r2_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_r2_high_ci)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Trait", 
       y = expression(Observed~R[s*minute]^2 / R[s]^2),
       title = 'SBayesRC: INFO-based masking',
       colour = NULL)

p2_ptclump <- ggplot(plot_data[pgs_method == 'pT+clump' & results_dt$population == 'EUR' & grepl('0_1_', results_dt$param), ], 
       aes(x = trait, y = rel_var, colour = model)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_var_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_var_high_ci)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Trait", 
       y = expression(Observed~Var[s*minute] / Var[s]),
       title = 'SBayesRC: INFO-based masking',
       colour = NULL)

p3_ptclump <- ggplot(plot_data[pgs_method == 'pT+clump' & results_dt$population == 'EUR' & grepl('0_1_', results_dt$param), ], 
       aes(x = trait, y = r2_baseline, colour = model)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = r2_baseline_low_ci, 
                    ymax = r2_baseline_high_ci)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Trait", 
       y = expression(Observed~Cor(s, s*minute)^2),
       title = 'SBayesRC: INFO-based masking',
       colour = NULL)

plot_grid(p1_ptclump, p2_ptclump, p3_ptclump, labels = c('A', 'B', 'C'), ncol = 1)

png('~/obs_rel_var_r2_recovered_comp_rimp_ptclump.png', res = 300, width = 2750, height = 2500, units = 'px')
plot_grid(p1_ptclump, p2_ptclump, p3_ptclump, labels = c('A', 'B', 'C'), ncol = 1)
dev.off()
system('dx upload ~/obs_rel_var_r2_recovered_comp_rimp_ptclump.png --path mind_the_gap/results/')

#######
# Compare estimated and observed relative variance and cor(s,s')^2 for recovered PGS
#######

# Read in estimated relative variance and cor(s,s')
est_dat <- fread('/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/results/est_rsq.wgs.sparse.recovered.rimp.txt')
est_dat<-est_dat[, c('beta_set','relative_variance_imputed','relative_R2_imputed','prop'), with = F]
names(est_dat)<-c('param','est_rel_var', 'cor2_baseline_imputed', 'prop')
est_dat$param<-paste0(est_dat$param, '_SUM')

results_dt_est <- merge(results_dt, est_dat, by = c('param','prop'))

# Compare estimated and observed relative R2
p1 <- ggplot(results_dt_est[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & results_dt_est$population == 'EUR', ], 
       aes(x = cor_baseline_recovered_sq, y = obs_rel_recovered_r2, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_low_ci, 
                    xmax = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_high_ci), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_r2_recovered_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_r2_recovered_high_ci), width = 0) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = expression(Observed~Cor(s, s*minute)^2),
        y = expression(Observed~R[s*minute]^2 / R[s]^2),
        colour = NULL)

# Compare estimated and observed relative R2
p2 <- ggplot(results_dt_est[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & results_dt_est$population == 'EUR', ], 
       aes(x = cor2_baseline_imputed, y = cor_baseline_recovered_sq, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_low_ci, 
                    ymax = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_high_ci), width = 0) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = expression(Estimated~Cor(s, s*minute)^2),
        y = expression(Observed~Cor(s, s*minute)^2),
        colour = NULL)

p3 <- ggplot(results_dt_est[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & results_dt_est$population == 'EUR', ], 
       aes(x = est_rel_var, y = obs_rel_recovered_var, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_var_recovered_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_var_recovered_high_ci), width = 0) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = expression(Estimated~Var[s*minute] / Var[s]),
        y = expression(Observed~Var[s*minute] / Var[s]),
        colour = NULL)

png('~/obs_est_rel_var_r2_comp_sparse_sbayesrc_recovered_rimp.png', res = 300, width = 2750, height = 3850, units = 'px')
plot_grid(p1, p2, p3, labels = c('A', 'B', 'C'), ncol = 1)
dev.off()
system('dx upload ~/obs_est_rel_var_r2_comp_sparse_sbayesrc_recovered_rimp.png --path mind_the_gap/results/')

png('~/obs_est_rel_var_r2_comp_sparse_sbayesrc_recovered_rimp_small.png', res = 300, width = 2750, height = 2500, units = 'px')
plot_grid(p2, p3, labels = c('A', 'B'), ncol = 1)
dev.off()
system('dx upload ~/obs_est_rel_var_r2_comp_sparse_sbayesrc_recovered_rimp_small.png --path mind_the_gap/results/')

# ptclump
p1_ptclump <- ggplot(results_dt_est[pgs_method == 'pT+clump' & results_dt_est$population == 'EUR' & grepl('0_1_', results_dt$param), ], 
       aes(x = cor2_baseline_imputed, y = obs_rel_recovered_r2, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_r2_recovered_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_r2_recovered_high_ci), width = 0) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = expression(Estimated~Cor(s, s*minute)^2),
        y = expression(Observed~R[s*minute]^2 / R[s]^2),
        colour = NULL)

# Compare estimated and observed relative R2
p2_ptclump <- ggplot(results_dt_est[pgs_method == 'pT+clump' & results_dt_est$population == 'EUR' & grepl('0_1_', results_dt$param), ], 
       aes(x = cor2_baseline_imputed, y = cor_baseline_recovered_sq, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_low_ci, 
                    ymax = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_high_ci), width = 0) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = expression(Estimated~Cor(s, s*minute)^2),
        y = expression(Observed~Cor(s, s*minute)^2),
        colour = NULL)

p3_ptclump <- ggplot(results_dt_est[pgs_method == 'pT+clump' & results_dt_est$population == 'EUR' & grepl('0_1_', results_dt$param), ], 
       aes(x = est_rel_var, y = obs_rel_recovered_var, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_var_recovered_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_var_recovered_high_ci), width = 0) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(NA, NA)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = expression(Estimated~Var[s*minute] / Var[s]),
        y = expression(Observed~Var[s*minute] / Var[s]),
        colour = NULL)

plot_grid(p1_ptclump, p2_ptclump, p3_ptclump, labels = c('A', 'B', 'C'), ncol = 1)

png('~/obs_est_rel_var_r2_comp_sparse_ptclump_recovered_rimp.png', res = 300, width = 2750, height = 3850, units = 'px')
plot_grid(p1_ptclump, p2_ptclump, p3_ptclump, labels = c('A', 'B', 'C'), ncol = 1)
dev.off()
system('dx upload ~/obs_est_rel_var_r2_comp_sparse_ptclump_recovered_rimp.png --path mind_the_gap/results/')

png('~/obs_est_rel_var_r2_comp_sparse_ptclump_recovered_rimp_small.png', res = 300, width = 2750, height = 2500, units = 'px')
plot_grid(p2, p3, labels = c('A', 'B'), ncol = 1)
dev.off()
system('dx upload ~/obs_est_rel_var_r2_comp_sparse_ptclump_recovered_rimp_small.png --path mind_the_gap/results/')

```

***

## WGS Dense: Baseline vs Masked (proportions)

```{r}

library(data.table)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(stringr)
library(foreach)
library(doMC)
registerDoMC(8)

# --- 1. Data Processing Loop ---
# This section is an enhanced version of your original code.

# Define analysis parameters
populations <- c('EUR')
traits <- c('HT', 'HB', 'PLT', 'BMI', 'BWT', 'MCHC', 'SBP', 'NEU', 'HDL', 'TC')
traits <- c('HT', 'HB', 'PLT', 'BMI', 'BWT', 'MCHC', 'SBP', 'HDL', 'TC')
base_dir_baseline <- '~/pgs_wgs/wgs_dense/baseline/'
base_dir_masked <- '~/pgs_wgs/wgs_dense/masked/'
pheno_dir <- '/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/phenotype/'
props <- c(0.05, 0.25, 0.5)

n_boot <- 100 # Number of bootstrap replicates (1000 is good, 100 for testing)
set.seed(123)  # For reproducible results

# Create the list to hold all results
final_results_list <- list()

# --- 2. RUN SEQUENTIAL OUTER LOOP (for pop) ---
# We use a standard 'for' loop for the sequential part
for (pop in populations) {
    print(paste("Processing Population:", pop))
  for (prop in props) {
    print(paste("Processing prop:", prop))
    # --- This code runs sequentially on the main thread, once per pop ---
    baseline_file <- paste0(base_dir_baseline, 'ukb.', pop, '.dense.sscore')
    masked_file <- paste0(base_dir_masked, 'ukb.', pop, '.dense.prop_', prop, '.sscore')
    
    if (!file.exists(baseline_file) || !file.exists(masked_file)) {
        print(paste("Skipping pop:", pop, "- files not found"))
        next # Use 'next' to skip to the next 'pop' in a 'for' loop
    }
    
    pgs_baseline <- fread(baseline_file)
    pgs_masked <- fread(masked_file)

    pgs_baseline <- pgs_baseline[pgs_baseline$IID %in% pgs_masked$IID, ]
    pgs_masked <- pgs_masked[pgs_masked$IID %in% pgs_baseline$IID, ]
    # --- End of sequential loading part ---


    # --- 3. RUN PARALLEL INNER LOOP (for trait) ---
    # Now, call foreach %dopar% to process all traits for THIS pop in parallel.
    # The '.export' is crucial to send the loaded data to the workers.
    trait_results_list <- foreach(
        trait = traits,
        .combine = 'append', # Appends the lists returned by each 'trait'
        .packages = 'data.table',
        .export = c('pheno_dir', 'n_boot', 'pgs_baseline', 'pgs_masked', 'pop') 
    ) %dopar% {
        
        pheno_file <- paste0(pheno_dir, trait, '.', pop, '.txt')
        if (!file.exists(pheno_file)) {
            return(list()) # Skip this trait, return an empty list
        }
        
        pheno <- fread(pheno_file)

        # Subset PGS data
        pgs_baseline_i <- pgs_baseline[, c('IID', names(pgs_baseline)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_baseline)) &
                                                                        grepl(trait, names(pgs_baseline))]), with = F]
        pgs_masked_i <- pgs_masked[, c('IID', names(pgs_masked)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_masked)) &
                                                                    grepl(trait, names(pgs_masked))]), with = F]
        
        # Merge PGS data
        pgs_baseline_pheno <- merge(pheno, pgs_baseline_i, by = 'IID', sort = FALSE)
        pgs_masked_pheno <- merge(pheno, pgs_masked_i, by = 'IID', sort = FALSE)
        
        param_cols <- names(pgs_baseline_i)[-1]
        
        # This list will hold results for all 'param's for THIS trait
        param_results_list <- list() 

        for (param in param_cols) {
            if (!(param %in% names(pgs_masked_pheno))) next
            
            n <- nrow(pgs_baseline_pheno)
            if (n == 0) next # Safety check
            
            # --- 1.5. BOOTSTRAPPING SECTION ---
            boot_stats <- replicate(n_boot, {
                indices <- sample(1:n, n, replace = TRUE)
                
                boot_base <- pgs_baseline_pheno[indices]
                boot_masked <- pgs_masked_pheno[indices]
                
                pheno_vals_base <- boot_base[['outcome']]
                pgs_vals_base <- boot_base[[param]]
                
                pheno_vals_masked <- boot_masked[['outcome']]
                pgs_vals_masked <- boot_masked[[param]]
                
                # R2 stats
                r2_base_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pheno_vals_base, pgs_vals_base)^2, error = function(e) NA)
                r2_masked_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pheno_vals_masked, pgs_vals_masked)^2, error = function(e) NA)
                
                # Relative Variance
                var_base_boot <- tryCatch(var(pgs_vals_base), error = function(e) NA)
                var_masked_boot <- tryCatch(var(pgs_vals_masked), error = function(e) NA)
                rel_var_boot <- if (is.na(var_base_boot) || is.na(var_masked_boot) || var_base_boot == 0) {
                    NA
                } else {
                    var_masked_boot / var_base_boot
                }
                
                # Correlation stat
                cor_base_masked_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pgs_vals_base, pgs_vals_masked), error = function(e) NA)
                cor_base_masked_sq_boot <- cor_base_masked_boot^2
                
                # Relative R2
                rel_r2_boot <- if (is.na(r2_base_boot) || is.na(r2_masked_boot) || r2_base_boot == 0) {
                    NA
                } else {
                    r2_masked_boot / r2_base_boot
                }
                
                # Return a named vector
                c(
                    r2_base = r2_base_boot,
                    r2_masked = r2_masked_boot,
                    rel_var = rel_var_boot,
                    cor_base_masked = cor_base_masked_boot,
                    cor_base_masked_sq = cor_base_masked_sq_boot,
                    rel_r2 = rel_r2_boot
                )
            })
            
            # Transpose boot_stats
            boot_stats_t <- t(boot_stats)
            
            # --- Calculate 95% CIs ---
            safe_quantile <- function(col_name) {
                quantile(boot_stats_t[, col_name], c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
            }
            
            r2_base_ci <- safe_quantile("r2_base")
            r2_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("r2_masked")
            rel_var_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_var")
            cor_base_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_base_masked")
            cor_base_masked_sq_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_base_masked_sq")
            rel_r2_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_r2")
            # --- END BOOTSTRAPPING ---
            
            # --- 1.6. Calculate Point Estimates ---
            r2_baseline_pheno <- cor(pgs_baseline_pheno[['outcome']], pgs_baseline_pheno[[param]])^2
            r2_masked_pheno <- cor(pgs_masked_pheno[['outcome']], pgs_masked_pheno[[param]])^2
            p_val <- coef(summary(lm(pgs_baseline_pheno[['outcome']] ~ pgs_baseline_pheno[[param]])))[2,4]
            cor_base_masked <- cor(pgs_baseline_pheno[[param]], pgs_masked_pheno[[param]])
            cor_baseline_masked_sq <- cor_base_masked^2
            
            var_baseline <- var(pgs_baseline_pheno[[param]])
            var_masked <- var(pgs_masked_pheno[[param]])
            rel_var_point <- var_masked / var_baseline

            # --- 1.7. Store results ---
            param_results_list[[length(param_results_list) + 1]] <- data.table(
                param = param,
                trait = trait,
                population = pop,
                prop = prop,
                r2_baseline_pheno = r2_baseline_pheno,
                r2_masked_pheno = r2_masked_pheno,
                cor_baseline_masked = cor_base_masked,
                cor_baseline_masked_sq = cor_baseline_masked_sq,
                obs_rel_r2 = r2_masked_pheno / r2_baseline_pheno,
                obs_rel_var = rel_var_point,
                p_baseline_pheno = p_val,
                n = nrow(pgs_baseline_pheno),
                r2_baseline_low_ci = r2_base_ci[1],
                r2_baseline_high_ci = r2_base_ci[2],
                r2_masked_low_ci = r2_masked_ci[1],
                r2_masked_high_ci = r2_masked_ci[2],
                rel_var_low_ci = rel_var_ci[1],
                rel_var_high_ci = rel_var_ci[2],
                cor_baseline_masked_low_ci = cor_base_masked_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_masked_high_ci = cor_base_masked_ci[2],
                cor_baseline_masked_sq_low_ci = cor_base_masked_sq_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_masked_sq_high_ci = cor_base_masked_sq_ci[2],
                rel_r2_low_ci = rel_r2_ci[1],
                rel_r2_high_ci = rel_r2_ci[2]
            )
        } # End of param loop
        
        # The parallel worker returns the list of data.tables for this trait
        return(param_results_list) 
        
    } # End of parallel trait loop

    # --- 4. COMBINE RESULTS (within sequential loop) ---
    # Append the results from this 'pop' (which are already combined from all traits)
    # to the final list.
    if (length(trait_results_list) > 0) {
        final_results_list <- append(final_results_list, trait_results_list)
    }
  }

} # End of sequential pop loop

results_dt <- rbindlist(final_results_list)
results_dt[, pgs_method := ifelse(str_detect(param, 'sbayesrc'), 'SBayesRC', 'pT+clump')]
results_dt$call_rate<-paste0('Call rate = ', 1-results_dt$prop)

# Plot the relative R2 between baseline and masked PGS
ggplot(results_dt[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC', ], 
       aes(x = trait, y = obs_rel_r2, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_r2_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_r2_high_ci)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
#  coord_fixed() +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Trait", 
       y = "Observed relative R2 (95%CI)",
       colour = NULL)

# Plot the relative variance between baseline and masked PGS
ggplot(results_dt[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC', ], 
       aes(x = trait, y = obs_rel_var, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_var_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_var_high_ci)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
#  coord_fixed() +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Trait", 
       y = "Observed relative variance (95%CI)",
       colour = NULL)
# Masked PGS have substantially lower variance as expected

# Plot the squared correlation between WGS and imputed genotype
ggplot(results_dt[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC', ], 
       aes(x = trait, y = cor_baseline_masked_sq, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = cor_baseline_masked_sq_low_ci, 
                    ymax = cor_baseline_masked_sq_high_ci)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
#  coord_fixed() +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Trait", 
       y = "Squared correlation between PGS (95%CI)",
       colour = NULL)
# There squared correlation between PGS is also significantly below 1.

# Compare squared correlation between PGS and observed relative R2
ggplot(results_dt[pgs_method == 'SBayesRC' & r2_baseline_pheno > 0.01, ], 
       aes(x = cor_baseline_masked_sq, y = obs_rel_r2, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = cor_baseline_masked_sq_low_ci, 
                    xmax = cor_baseline_masked_sq_high_ci), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_r2_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_r2_high_ci), width = 0) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
#  coord_fixed() +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Squared correlation between PGS (95%CI)", 
       y = "Observed relative R2 (95%CI)",
       colour = NULL)

# Compare squared correlation between PGS and observed relative R2
ggplot(results_dt[pgs_method == 'pT+clump' & r2_baseline_pheno > 0.01 & grepl('0.01', results_dt$param), ], 
       aes(x = cor_baseline_masked_sq, y = obs_rel_r2, colour = trait)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_abline(colour = 'red') +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = cor_baseline_masked_sq_low_ci, 
                    xmax = cor_baseline_masked_sq_high_ci), width = 0) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rel_r2_low_ci, 
                    ymax = rel_r2_high_ci), width = 0) +
  facet_grid(. ~ call_rate) +
#  coord_fixed() +
  theme_half_open() +
  panel_border() +
  background_grid() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Squared correlation between PGS (95%CI)", 
       y = "Observed relative R2 (95%CI)",
       colour = NULL)

```

# Estimate relative PGS R2 and variance

Do this on CREATE to save time and money. Export the SNP lists that are being masked.

```{bash}
dx upload random_snps.txt --path mind_the_gap/
```

```{bash}
source ~/.bashrc

gdown 1HkxMT2UJKK__TfqNcZQoO7Q9XGnVtI28

tar -xvJf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/ld_ref/ukbEUR_HM3.tar.xz

gdown 1kPOp2mc1odJBInd66sC40aKNwOhC--5A
tar -xvJf ukbAFR_HM3.tar.xz
tar -xvJf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/ld_ref/ukbAFR_HM3.tar.xz
```
